title: White .. So Very White
content:
Earlier this week, I woke up with some sort of sound in my head. The sound said "I'm getting tired of the old-blue-theme." ... As a result, I came up with this one. :)

Also, I'm now fully  "MT-ed":http://www.movabletype.org . TBOX is now a static site (i.e., No more on-the-fly, PHP-generated content). ... As a result, the URLs have been changed (again). The search engines will hate this.

Last but not least, the standard disclaimer, this latest version is still buggy. :)
